title: YouTube Poop: Link the murderer
description:
This is the first of my series of poops that actually tell a story! A large part of this episode was drawn on flash if anyone's interested.

Link kills the king and tries to hide it from Zelda by telling her that the king went to Gamelon to poo on Ganon. Will he get away with it?
